notes: All 5 phase-3 tasks (mxdx-awe.12, .13, .14, .15, .16) executed and closed on branch brains/rust-p2p-interactive. T-30 (mxdx-awe.12, commit 20e9cfe): crates/mxdx-p2p/src/channel/mod.rs defines WebRtcChannel trait with async_trait cfg-gated for ?Send on wasm per storm §2.2; ChannelEvent {LocalIce, Message(bytes::Bytes), Open, Closed{reason}, Failure(String)}; IceServer {urls, username, credential}; Sdp {kind, sdp}; SdpKind {Offer, Answer}; IceCandidate {candidate, sdp_mid, sdp_mline_index}; ChannelError with RestartIceUnsupported + FrameTooLarge + InvalidSdp/Candidate/IceInitFailed/Closed/Backend; MAX_INBOUND_FRAME_SIZE=1MiB and EVENT_QUEUE_DEPTH=256 pub const per storm §4.4; event_channel() helper returns bounded tokio mpsc. async-trait + bytes + tokio (sync feature on both targets, full on native) added to Cargo.toml. Compile-time Send+'static assertion test on native. T-31 (mxdx-awe.13, commit 6a541f4): crates/mxdx-p2p/src/channel/native.rs implements NativeWebRtcChannel via datachannel 0.16 + vendored libdatachannel (features=[log,vendored]). Architecture: Arc<PcShared> holds event sender + Mutex<Option<DataChannel Box>> + Mutex<Option<oneshot::Sender<SessionDescription>>>; PcHandler + DcHandler callbacks fire on libdatachannel C threads and push ChannelEvent via non-blocking try_send (drop-on-overflow per storm §4.4 outbound queue depth 256); tokio oneshot surfaces first on_description to async create_offer/accept_offer; auto-negotiation (default) fires on_description synchronously when create_data_channel or set_remote_description runs; pending-candidate buffer mirrors packages/core/webrtc-channel-node.js:164-171. IceServer → libdatachannel URL string conversion (stun:/turn:/turns: schemes; injects user:pass@ when caller provides them separately, per npm reference lines 34-55). restart_ice returns ChannelError::RestartIceUnsupported because datachannel-sys 0.23 does not expose rtcSetConfiguration via FFI — Phase 5's state machine must interpret as 'tear down and re-invite' rather than hard failure. Cardinal-rule enforcement: on_message logs only frame length at log::debug (never bytes); send path silent; oversize frames (>1MiB) dropped with Failure event; accept_answer checks PC existence before SDP parse so pre-offer error surfaces cleanly; channel close is idempotent. T-32 (mxdx-awe.14, commit 1e5f2ce): crates/mxdx-p2p/tests/loopback.rs runs two NativeWebRtcChannel in one process on 127.0.0.1 with no STUN/TURN servers (host candidates only — Path A from map plan open-question #3 worked cleanly, Path B mock not needed). Flow: alice.create_offer(&[]) → bob.accept_offer(&[], offer) → alice.accept_answer → candidate relay loop pumps both directions until both sides emit Open → alice.send(payload) → bob receives Message(payload) bit-exact → clean close. Wrapped in tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_secs(2)); observed runtime 1.03s on local hardware. cfg-gated to non-wasm. T-33 (mxdx-awe.15, commit dc7cb7e): CI jobs rust-p2p-unit + rust-p2p-loopback add cmake + g++ alongside libssl-dev/libsqlite3-dev (vendored libdatachannel requires C++17 compiler + cmake). New build-only-native job matrix {ubuntu-latest, macos-latest} runs 'cargo build -p mxdx-p2p'; macOS uses brew install cmake if missing. crates/mxdx-p2p/README.md 'Local development' section documents apt/brew commands, vendored model, loopback verify command, and confirms wasm dep graph unaffected (cargo tree -p mxdx-p2p --target wasm32-unknown-unknown | grep datachannel returns empty). T-34 (mxdx-awe.16, commit db1a0ad): New musl-build CI job with continue-on-error: true — installs musl-tools + cmake + g++ + pkg-config, sets CC/CXX/LINKER to musl-gcc/musl-g++, runs cargo build -p mxdx-p2p --target x86_64-unknown-linux-musl. Informative not gating per teammate brief (Phase 3 does not block on T-34). README 'Cross-compiling to musl' section documents local verify command + continue-on-error disposition + likely breakage modes. Follow-up bead mxdx-cpd filed under brains:phase-6 + brains:topic:rust-p2p-interactive to revisit when Phase 6 wires mxdx-worker --features p2p. Nurture + secure pass (commit d7d63bf): Grep confirms only 2 logging sites in channel/, both metadata-only (frame size at log::debug in on_message, candidate-add failure at log::warn); cardinal rule preserved; libdatachannel internal logs are metadata (SDP, ICE, state) never payload bytes — documented in native.rs header. Trait verified callable from both async (native) and ?Send (wasm) contexts via cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown. Handler-translation unit tests (18 tests, added in T-31) exercise each callback → ChannelEvent mapping without a real PC so the translation is tested even when libdatachannel is absent. scripts/check-no-unencrypted-sends.sh green throughout. Final verification: cargo test -p mxdx-p2p — 59 passed, 1 ignored, 0 failed (was 33 pre-phase); cargo check -p mxdx-p2p --target wasm32-unknown-unknown — green; cargo clippy -p mxdx-p2p --all-targets — 0 new warnings (single pre-existing warning in turn.rs:372 unrelated); cargo check --workspace --exclude mxdx-core-wasm — zero errors. Pre-existing mxdx-types::keychain_chain test failure unrelated (phase-3 scope did not touch). Phase 4 (m.call.* signaling helpers + glare resolver) can now depend on WebRtcChannel trait surface (Sdp, IceCandidate types in particular) and NativeWebRtcChannel for integration tests.

follow_ups.title: Musl cross-compile verification — follow-up from T-34
follow_ups.reason: musl-build CI job is informative (continue-on-error: true) during Phase 3 because vendored libdatachannel musl compatibility is unverified. Phase 6 (worker p2p wiring) must confirm or escalate.

verification_commands: cd /home/liamhelmer/repos/epiphytic/mxdx && cargo tree -p mxdx-p2p --target wasm32-unknown-unknown | grep datachannel
